info.title: In Atelier Public API
info.summary: Unified, versioned, and documented public API surface grouped into coherent /v1 families.
info.description: Unified public gateway contract for the In Atelier BaaS platform. The surface is exposed through APISIX, versioned under /v1, pinned with X-API-Version, and organized into stable families for platform, tenants, workspaces, authorization, PostgreSQL administration and data control, events, functions, storage, metrics, and realtime routes.

XApiVersion.name: X-API-Version
XApiVersion.description: Pinned additive contract version for the v1 public API release published with gateway QoS and hardening support.

XCorrelationId.name: X-Correlation-Id
XCorrelationId.description: Stable request correlation identifier reused by downstream authorization, orchestration, audit flows, and backfilled by the gateway when recovery requires it.

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Stable idempotency token for safe retries of POST, PUT, PATCH, and DELETE operations routed through the gateway. Replays are retained for 24h and surfaced through X-Idempotency-Replayed.

PageSize.name: page[size]
PageSize.description: Maximum number of items to return for list and catalog routes.

PageAfter.name: page[after]
PageAfter.description: Opaque cursor for the next page window.

Sort.name: sort
Sort.description: Stable sort field for catalog and collection routes.

Search.name: search
Search.description: Free-text search across human-facing route metadata.

FilterFamily.name: family
FilterFamily.description: Filter the route catalog by public API family.

FilterScope.name: scope
FilterScope.description: Filter the route catalog by control scope.

FilterResourceType.name: resourceType
FilterResourceType.description: Filter the route catalog by canonical resource type.

FilterMethod.name: method
FilterMethod.description: Filter the route catalog by HTTP method.

FilterAudience.name: audience
FilterAudience.description: Filter the route catalog by intended consumer audience.

FilterVisibility.name: visibility
FilterVisibility.description: Filter the route catalog by visibility mode.

RealmId.name: realmId
RealmId.description: Stable tenant realm identifier managed through the BaaS IAM surface.

ClientId.name: clientId
ClientId.description: Stable client identifier inside one managed realm.

RoleName.name: roleName
RoleName.description: Stable realm-role name inside one managed realm.

ScopeName.name: scopeName
ScopeName.description: Stable client-scope identifier inside one managed realm.

IamUserId.name: iamUserId
IamUserId.description: Stable Keycloak user identifier inside one managed realm.

FilterEnabled.name: filter[enabled]
FilterEnabled.description: Filter IAM collections by enabled status.

FilterProtocol.name: filter[protocol]
FilterProtocol.description: Filter client or scope collections by protocol.

FederatedProviderId.name: providerId
FederatedProviderId.description: Stable federated identity-provider identifier within one external application.

FilterTenantId.name: filter[tenantId]
FilterTenantId.description: Restrict workspace discovery to one tenant boundary.

FilterWorkspaceSlug.name: filter[slug]
FilterWorkspaceSlug.description: Filter workspaces by exact slug inside the tenant boundary.

FilterWorkspaceDisplayName.name: filter[displayName]
FilterWorkspaceDisplayName.description: Filter workspaces by display name inside the tenant boundary.

FilterTenantPlanId.name: filter[planId]
FilterTenantPlanId.description: Filter tenants by assigned commercial plan.

FilterTenantLabel.name: filter[label]
FilterTenantLabel.description: Filter tenants by one governance label expression such as segment:growth.

PostgresRoleName.name: postgresRoleName
PostgresRoleName.description: Stable PostgreSQL role identifier managed through the BaaS contract.

PostgresUserName.name: postgresUserName
PostgresUserName.description: Stable PostgreSQL user identifier managed through the BaaS contract.

DatabaseName.name: databaseName
DatabaseName.description: Stable PostgreSQL database identifier managed through the BaaS contract.

SchemaName.name: schemaName
SchemaName.description: Stable PostgreSQL schema identifier managed through the BaaS contract.

action.description: Canonical action identifier such as workspace.update or bucket.write.

EntityMetadata.description: Non-secret additive metadata for canonical entities.

tenantId.description: Stable tenant identifier for the parent tenant that will own the workspace.

IamAttributes.description: Multi-valued IAM attributes normalized from Keycloak user, role, scope, realm, and client metadata.

DurationString.description: Compact duration string used by in-atelier lifecycle policies.
